subcodes.first_line: O Husayn, upon thee be My Glory! Thou wert enkindled with the fire of the love of God and didst stand firm in the service of His mighty Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علیک بهائی کنت مشتعلا بنار محبه الله و قائما علی خدمه امره المحکم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
